creator: rk@ronald.org
text:
On Monday, July 31, 2006 at 23:20:24 CEST, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of graphics/ocaml-lablgl,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/101127 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/101127

Hi,

that's fine with me. I'm currently unable to properly maintain
this port myself. So I would be happy if the submitter (Stanislav Sedov)
could take over this port if he likes. If he doesn't want to become
maintainer of graphics/ocaml-lablgl please change the MAINTAINER
line to ports@freebsd.org.

Ronald
